must_have_quals: 3+ years of software development experience at major technology companies and/or software startups building SaaS products and Agents, Real passion for solving complex customer problems using data insights, data science and analytics, General understanding of data structures, algorithms and distributed computing concepts, Proficiency in Python, Spark, SQL, etc and Apache Airflow, Databricks, Snowflake, DAX and ETL, Experience in visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, and Adobe Analytics, B.S. in Computer Science (or equivalent experience)

core_responsibilities: Build technical specifications, prototypes and presentations to communicate your ideas, Design, build, improve and maintain highly performant and highly scalable services and data processing pipelines, Work in a small, collaborative, highly productive, and high output team environment, Champion standard methodologies and process improvements within the team, Learn new technologies and technical solutions
job_summary: Adobe is a leading company that empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools. The Senior Software Engineer will play a pivotal role in building scalable systems that democratize access to data, focusing on transforming how businesses derive insights from customer data.
